# Patch collections before anything else
import collections
from collections.abc import Iterable
collections.Iterable = Iterable

# Now import
from logalyzer.filters import ip_allowlist_filter

# Test performance with list
import time
large_list = list(range(1000))
f = ip_allowlist_filter(large_list)

from logalyzer.parser import LogEntry
entry = LogEntry(ip='999', user='u', timestamp=None, method='GET', url='/', protocol='HTTP/1.1', status=200, bytes=100)

start = time.time()
for _ in range(10000):
    f(entry)
end = time.time()
print(f'List lookup time: {end - start:.4f}s')

# Test with set
large_set = set(range(1000))
f2 = ip_allowlist_filter(large_set)

start = time.time()
for _ in range(10000):
    f2(entry)
end = time.time()
print(f'Set lookup time: {end - start:.4f}s')
"
